_meta.purpose: Synaptic index for ai_engineering knowledge graph. Fires when AI engineering topics appear in conversation — surfaces relevant domain without loading 28,096 entities. Full graph: ai_engineering_knowledge_graph.json. Query via: tool_rag_service.py.
_meta.design: Fire this index when AI engineering topics appear in conversation — surfaces relevant domain knowledge without loading the full graph. The knowledge is here. The loading is on-demand.
_meta.excluded: DeepSeek-specific prompt engineering book — preserved in raw_text/ for standalone indexing later

source_documents.title: Engineering AI Systems: Architecture and DevOps Essentials
source_documents.author: Bass, L.
source_documents.one_line: System-level AI engineering — architecture patterns, DevOps for ML, production deployment, monitoring, and operational best practices.

source_documents.title: Building Applications with Foundation Models
source_documents.author: Huyen, C.
source_documents.one_line: Most current (2025) — building real applications on top of LLMs and foundation models. RAG, fine-tuning, evaluation, agent design, context management.

source_documents.title: Prompt Engineering for Generative AI
source_documents.author: Phoenix, J.
source_documents.one_line: Systematic prompt engineering — patterns, few-shot, chain-of-thought, structured outputs. Practical for designing agent boot sequences and tool prompts.

source_documents.title: From Boolean Matrix Theory to Logical Dynamical Systems
source_documents.author: Li, H.
source_documents.one_line: Mathematical theory — Boolean matrix methods, logical dynamical systems. Formal/theoretical foundation work, less immediately practical.

source_documents.title: Generative AI Foundations in Python
source_documents.author: Rodriguez, C.
source_documents.one_line: Hands-on generative AI in Python — Hugging Face, LangChain, transformers, local model inference. Most relevant for KG_Pipeline and tool development.

source_documents.title: Pretraining Context Compressor for Large Language Models with Embedding-Based Memory
source_documents.one_line: Research paper — embedding-based memory and context compression for LLMs. Directly relevant to boot sequence optimization and long-context management.

source_documents.title: Doing AI Differently (whitepaper)
source_documents.one_line: Whitepaper on alternative AI development methodology — ethics, human-centered design, responsible deployment.

domain_map.one_line: Agent design patterns — tool use, ReAct loops, multi-agent orchestration. Primary: Huyen, Bass.
RAG architecture — chunking, embedding, vector search, hybrid retrieval, reranking. Primary: Huyen, Rodriguez.
Prompt design — patterns, few-shot, CoT, structured outputs. Primary: Phoenix, Huyen.
Context and memory management — compression, long-context strategies. Primary: Context Compressor paper, Huyen.
domain_map.note: Especially relevant to boot sequence and context management architecture — research-level knowledge on memory compression and long-context handling.

domain_map.one_line: LLM evaluation — metrics, benchmarks, hallucination detection, faithfulness. Primary: Huyen, Bass.
Production AI systems — deployment, scaling, monitoring, operational concerns. Primary: Bass.
Local model inference in Python — Ollama, Hugging Face, quantized models. Primary: Rodriguez.

self_relevance_note: When designing boot sequences, memory compression, agent patterns, or RAG pipelines — query here first. The Context Compressor paper and Huyen's book contain research-level knowledge directly applicable to these problems.

how_to_query.status: tool_rag_service is currently MOCK — real implementation pending
